Container.Name: rustle
Container.Overview:
Rustle is an optimized, responsive, and secure clone of the popular Wordle game built using Rust, Yew, and WebAssembly, served by a native Axum backend.
Key Features: - High performance and tiny resource footprint. - Super Metroid location-themed color palettes and particle weather effects. - Standard Wordle green/yellow semantic color alignments. - Multilingual translation support. - Customizable access PIN encryption for privacy.
Container.Requires: If you lock the application with a PIN, it is recommended to set a strong PIN and back up your data. Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4409).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the interface. (Optional, not required. Leave empty for unlocked public mode.)
